requirement_topic.en: Cape Verde Market Access — IGQPI Standards, ARME Regulation, and Nascent EV Demand
requirement_topic.zh: 佛得角市场准入——IGQPI标准、ARME监管与早期电动汽车需求
requirement_topic.zht: 維德角市場准入——IGQPI標準、ARME監管與早期電動汽車需求

summary.en: IGQPI is Cape Verde's national quality and standards institution, ARME regulates the electricity and broader economic sectors, and ELECTRA operates the electricity utility interface. Cape Verde is a Lusophone Atlantic small-island developing state with a strong renewable-energy policy direction and a nascent EV market. EV charger imports and projects should be checked against the applicable IGQPI standards route, ARME/ELECTRA project conditions, customs classification, importer obligations, Portuguese-language documentation, and tender-specific IEC/European specifications.
summary.zh: IGQPI是佛得角国家质量和标准机构，ARME监管电力及更广泛经济部门，ELECTRA承担电力公用事业接口。佛得角是葡语北大西洋小岛屿发展中国家，可再生能源政策方向明确，但电动汽车市场仍处早期。电动汽车充电桩进口和项目应核实适用的IGQPI标准路径、ARME/ELECTRA项目条件、海关归类、进口商义务、葡萄牙语文件以及招标指定的IEC/欧洲规范。
summary.zht: IGQPI是維德角國家品質和標準機構，ARME監管電力及更廣泛經濟部門，ELECTRA承擔電力公用事業接口。維德角是葡語北大西洋小島嶼發展中國家，可再生能源政策方向明確，但電動汽車市場仍處早期。電動汽車充電樁進口和項目應核實適用的IGQPI標準路徑、ARME/ELECTRA項目條件、海關歸類、進口商義務、葡萄牙語文件以及招標指定的IEC/歐洲規範。

standards_or_laws: IGQPI national standards and conformity infrastructure
ELECTRA utility project and connection requirements
Cape Verde renewable-energy and small-island infrastructure policy context
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 where specified

summary.en: China-market charger documentation normally centers on GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930 DC communication, and any China CCC or domestic project evidence that applies. Those documents can support engineering review but do not automatically establish Cape Verde market access, IGQPI acceptance, ARME/ELECTRA project approval, Portuguese-language documentation readiness, or IEC Type 2 / CCS2 interoperability.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩文件通常围绕GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、GB/T 27930直流通信，以及适用的中国CCC或国内项目证据。这些文件可支持工程审查，但不能自动证明佛得角市场准入、IGQPI接受、ARME/ELECTRA项目批准、葡萄牙语文件就绪或IEC Type 2 / CCS2互操作。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁文件通常圍繞GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、GB/T 27930直流通訊，以及適用的中國CCC或國內項目證據。這些文件可支持工程審查，但不能自動證明維德角市場准入、IGQPI接受、ARME/ELECTRA項目批准、葡萄牙語文件就緒或IEC Type 2 / CCS2互操作。

gap.en: Before claiming Cape Verde readiness, exporters should map the importer, HS code, charger type, AC/DC rating, connector configuration, radio and payment functions, Portuguese labels and manuals, IEC reports, coastal-environment derating, spare-part plan, and project approval path. The market is promising because of Cape Verde's renewable-energy direction, but its EV demand is still nascent and likely project-led.
gap.zh: 出口商在宣称可进入佛得角前，应明确进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、交流/直流额定值、接口配置、无线及支付功能、葡萄牙语标签和手册、IEC报告、沿海环境降额、备件方案和项目审批路径。佛得角可再生能源方向带来机会，但电动汽车需求仍处早期，预计主要由项目驱动。
gap.zht: 出口商在宣稱可進入維德角前，應明確進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、交流/直流額定值、接口配置、無線及支付功能、葡萄牙語標籤和手冊、IEC報告、沿海環境降額、備件方案和項目審批路徑。維德角可再生能源方向帶來機會，但電動汽車需求仍處早期，預計主要由項目驅動。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — market-access and project obligations depend on product classification, importer role, applicable IGQPI standards, ARME/ELECTRA conditions, and tender specifications; project approval remains separate from China domestic evidence
mandatory_status.cn: China CCC or GB/T evidence may be useful supporting documentation but is not an automatic Cape Verde market-access approval

source.publisher: ELECTRA — Empresa de Eletricidade e Água

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cape Verde readiness is project-specific: confirm IGQPI standards route, ARME/ELECTRA conditions, Portuguese documentation, IEC evidence, and coastal-island service assumptions before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 佛得角就绪状态取决于具体项目：报价或出货前应确认IGQPI标准路径、ARME/ELECTRA条件、葡萄牙语文件、IEC证据和沿海岛屿服务假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 維德角就緒狀態取決於具體項目：報價或出貨前應確認IGQPI標準路徑、ARME/ELECTRA條件、葡萄牙語文件、IEC證據和沿海島嶼服務假設。
